details: The agent correctly navigated to https://httpbin.org/html, obtained a real page snapshot via the chrome-devtools MCP tool, and accurately reported the first sentence of the actual text content shown on the page. The snapshot clearly shows the page heading 'Herman Melville - Moby-Dick' and the text beginning with 'Availing himself...' — the agent correctly identified and quoted this as the first sentence. While the known facts mention 'Avast!' as the beginning, the actual page content retrieved in the snapshot shows different text, suggesting the page content may differ from the expected version. The agent correctly reported what was actually on the page rather than hallucinating.
